threshold.example: She paused at the threshold of the door.
He has a high pain threshold.
threshold.example_zh: 他對疼痛的忍受度很高。

thrill.example: The roller coaster gave us a thrill.
thrill.example_zh: 雲霄飛車讓我們覺得很刺激。

thrill.example: The magic show thrilled the children.
thrill.example_zh: 魔術表演讓孩子們興奮不已。

thriller.example_zh: 我們看了一部刺激的驚悚片。

thrive.example: Plants thrive in the warm sun.
thrive.example_zh: 植物在溫暖的陽光下茁壯生長。

throne.example: The young prince took the throne.
throne.example_zh: 年輕的王子登上了王位。

thrust.example: He thrust the key into the lock.
thrust.example_zh: 他把鑰匙猛地插進鎖孔。

thrust.example: The engine's thrust pushed the rocket up.
thrust.example_zh: 引擎的推力把火箭往上推。

tick.example: Put a tick next to the right answer.
I heard the tick of the clock.

tile.example: The bathroom floor has white tiles.
tile.example_zh: 浴室地板鋪著白色磁磚。

tin.example: She opened a tin of beans.

toll.example: We paid a toll to use the highway.
toll.example_zh: 我們付了通行費才上高速公路。

toll.example: The death toll from the storm rose.
toll.example_zh: 這場風暴的死亡人數上升了。

torch.example: He lit a torch to see in the cave.
torch.example_zh: 他點起火炬好在洞裡看清楚。

torment.example: The mosquito bites tormented him all night.
torment.example_zh: 蚊子叮咬折磨了他一整夜。

traitor.example: He was called a traitor for betraying them.
traitor.example_zh: 他因背叛他們而被稱為叛徒。

transaction.example_zh: 銀行記錄了每一筆交易。

transformation.example_zh: 花園的轉變令我們驚豔。

transit.example: The goods were damaged in transit.
transit.example_zh: 貨物在運送途中受損了。

transition.example: The transition to a new school was smooth.
transition.example_zh: 轉到新學校的過渡很順利。

transmission.example_zh: 洗手能減少病毒的傳播。

transparent.example: The water was clear and transparent.

trauma.example: The accident left her with deep trauma.
trauma.example_zh: 那場意外給她留下了深深的創傷。

treaty.example: The two nations signed a peace treaty.

tribute.example: The song was a tribute to her hero.
tribute.example_zh: 這首歌是向她心目中的英雄致敬。

trigger.example: He pulled the trigger of the toy gun.
trigger.example_zh: 他扣下了玩具槍的扳機。

trim.example: He trimmed the bushes in the garden.
trim.example_zh: 他修剪了花園裡的灌木。

triple.example_zh: 公司的利潤增加到三倍。

trivial.example: Don't worry about such trivial matters.

trophy.example: She lifted the trophy above her head.

tumor.example: The doctor removed a small tumor.
tumor.example_zh: 醫生切除了一個小腫瘤。

tuna.example: She made a tuna sandwich for lunch.
tuna.example_zh: 她做了一個鮪魚三明治當午餐。

ultimate.example: Their ultimate goal is to win the cup.
ultimate.example_zh: 他們的最終目標是奪冠。

undergo.example: He will undergo surgery next week.

undergraduate.example: She is an undergraduate studying art.
undergraduate.example_zh: 她是個讀藝術的大學生。

undermine.example_zh: 不斷的批評會削弱自信。

undertake.example_zh: 她接下了一個困難的專案。

undo.example: Press this button to undo the change.
undo.example_zh: 按這個鍵就能還原變更。

undoubtedly.example: She is undoubtedly the best singer.
undoubtedly.example_zh: 她無疑是最優秀的歌手。

unemployment.example_zh: 經濟衰退期間失業率上升。

unfold.example: She unfolded the map on the table.

unlock.example: Use this key to unlock the door.

unprecedented.example: The heat this summer was unprecedented.
unprecedented.example_zh: 今年夏天的炎熱是前所未有的。

update.example: She updated the software on her phone.
update.example_zh: 她更新了手機上的軟體。

update.example: Here is an update on the news.

upgrade.example: He upgraded to a faster computer.
upgrade.example_zh: 他升級換了一台更快的電腦。

upgrade.example: The hotel gave us a free upgrade.

utility.example: We pay our utility bills each month.
utility.example_zh: 我們每個月繳水電瓦斯費。

utilize.example: We should utilize our time well.
utilize.example_zh: 我們應該好好運用時間。

vacuum.example: She used a vacuum to clean the carpet.

vague.example: His directions were too vague to follow.
vague.example_zh: 他的指示太含糊，難以照著走。

valid.example: Your ticket is valid for one day.

variable.example: The weather here is very variable.

variation.example: There is some variation in the colors.

vein.example: Blood flows back to the heart through veins.
vein.example_zh: 血液經由靜脈流回心臟。

vendor.example: A street vendor sold us hot snacks.
vendor.example_zh: 一個街頭小販賣給我們熱點心。

venture.example: Starting a business is a risky venture.
venture.example_zh: 創業是個有風險的事業。

venture.example: They ventured into the dark forest.
venture.example_zh: 他們冒險走進了黑暗的森林。
